notes: Miniature pocket/field converter; no rack units. USB port is physically a Mini-B connector, mapped to usb-micro as the closest vocabulary match. Power connector is a threaded locking coaxial barrel, mapped to dc-barrel; accepts +5V to +32V DC.

ports.name: SDI Loop Out 1
ports.note: 12G/6G/3G/HD/SD-SDI; re-clocked loop-through by default, assignable as auxiliary output

ports.name: SDI Loop Out 2
ports.note: 12G/6G/3G/HD/SD-SDI; re-clocked loop-through by default, assignable as auxiliary output

ports.name: SDI Main Out 1
ports.note: 12G/6G/3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable primary output of the scaling engine

ports.name: SDI Main Out 2
ports.note: 12G/6G/3G/HD/SD-SDI; configurable primary output of the scaling engine

ports.name: USB
ports.note: Physically USB Mini-B; control panel software and firmware updates

ports.name: DC Power In
ports.note: Threaded locking coaxial barrel; accepts +5V to +32V DC
